name: Rho-Bot
subtitle: Autonomous Desktop Agent
description: An autonomous desktop agent that automates computer tasks by observing user behavior, learning goals, and executing actions through clicks and keystrokes. Decomposes user objectives into hierarchical plans and executes them locally — a cheaper alternative to LLM-based computer automation.

name: CloudRun
subtitle: Compliance-First Last-Mile Delivery Marketplace
description: An age-restricted delivery marketplace (Model A, Texas-first) connecting merchants, customers, and drivers for regulated products. Features intelligent dispatch orchestration (FAST + BATCH algorithms), real-time tracking, age/ID verification, H3 geospatial indexing, OSRM routing, and full compliance infrastructure. FastAPI backend with 50+ endpoints, Celery workers, and four React storefronts.

name: TravelPal
subtitle: Gamified Location-Based Experience Platform
description: A monorepo containing three React apps (FlavorAtlas, QuestLog, PhantomNav) sharing a Firebase backend and ~24 shared modules. Each app skins the same core concept — discovering and collecting real-world places — with a different video game aesthetic (Palia, Genshin Impact, Persona 5). Think Pokedex meets Yelp meets gacha games.

name: SparkSeekr
subtitle: Companionship App
description: A companionship app where Seekers find their Muse.

name: Tiny OCR
subtitle: Specialized STEM OCR Service
description: A specialized OCR service that converts images of math equations, chemical structures, handwriting, and documents into structured text (LaTeX, SMILES, Markdown). Targets researchers, chemists, educators, and developers with sub-50ms latency and 99.7% accuracy on STEM content.

name: Tiny Tessarachnid
subtitle: Simplified Modern Tesseract OCR
description: A simplified modern implementation of Tesseract OCR. The core model powering the tiny-ocr service, glyph-daemon, and related OCR projects.

name: Glyph Daemon
subtitle: Encrypted OCR Inference Backend
description: Encrypted inference backend for the tiny-tessarachnid OCR models. Serves three model versions (RetinaOCRNet, RetinaOCRGPT, ContourOCRNet) behind a FastAPI endpoint with AES-256 encrypted weights that decrypt into memory at boot.

name: Winnie Interface
subtitle: RLHF Annotation Rater
description: Web interface for rating OCR bounding-box annotations for the tiny-tessarachnid pipeline. Shows document images alongside interactive SVG bounding-box overlays at four hierarchical levels with Good/Bad rating buttons for human feedback.

name: Nissl
subtitle: Hierarchical Detection + Infill Network
description: Extends the tiny-tessarachnid OCR architecture with a masked infill head that proves the model understands detected content by reconstructing it from surrounding context. Uses ResNet encoder with autoregressive detection and U-Net decoder for pixel reconstruction.

name: Macrodose
subtitle: macOS Behavior Logger & Action Predictor
description: A macOS behaviour logger and hierarchical action-prediction model. Captures mouse clicks, keyboard events, screenshots, and the accessibility tree at every event, then trains a model that predicts the next user action by auto-regressively zooming through the UI hierarchy.

name: Mangaka
subtitle: Hierarchical Manga Analysis & Generation
description: Converts manga pages into structured JSON representations and back into images through four stages: cloud annotation with vision LLMs (Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini), local model training (GPT-2 + Stable Diffusion), distillation loop, and dataset generation for RAG/finetuning.

name: Musepix
subtitle: Music/Sheet Music OCR
description: A retina-based hierarchical detector for sheet music images. Detects and recognizes musical elements with audio OCR, MIDI decoding, symbol similarity models, and OpenAI-based annotation.

name: Handwriting Orca Math
subtitle: Handwriting Recognition
description: Handwriting recognition system for mathematical content.

name: Room Detection
subtitle: AI Room/Photo Classification
description: Room detection and classification from photos. Full AWS infrastructure with EC2 instance, Lambda functions, ECS cluster, and S3 storage. Deployed via CloudFormation and SAM CLI.

name: Hierarchical Goal Induction
subtitle: Research Paper
description: Academic research on hierarchical goal induction.

name: Every Noise
subtitle: Music Genre Classifier
description: Scrapes genre-to-artist mappings from Every Noise at Once and Spotify, downloads music, maps artists to YouTube, and trains a music genre classifier.

name: Selective Speaker
subtitle: Voice App
description: Voice/speaker-related application with a registered Firebase Android app.

name: Browser-Use Travel Agent Benchmark
subtitle: AI Agent Browser Benchmark
description: A benchmark suite for evaluating AI agents that use browsers to complete travel-related tasks. Includes categorized tasks, a runner, and report generation.

name: Epsteinalysis
subtitle: Epstein Document Analysis Platform
description: A document analysis and investigation platform for exploring ~1.05 million documents (2.08 million pages) related to the Epstein case. Provides browsing, searching, timeline views, network analysis, entity exploration, and image/video analysis.

name: Project Icarus
subtitle: AI Agent for Epstein Story Discovery
description: A Python CLI tool using Anthropic Claude to discover and publish stories from the Epstein files via Reddit (PRAW) and Twitter (Tweepy).

name: Epstein Corollary
subtitle: Related Analysis Tooling
description: Related analysis/tooling for the Epstein investigation.

name: Elonalysis
subtitle: Elon Musk Sentiment Analysis
description: A real-time sentiment analysis and fact-checking platform that monitors public perception of Elon Musk across X/Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, news sites, and Hacker News. Tracks sentiment trends, verifies claims, monitors promises, and analyzes how events impact public opinion.

name: Black Ringo
subtitle: AI Comic Generator
description: Paste links to comics and it generates a brand new comic in their combined style. Built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.

name: Video Generation Pipeline
subtitle: AI-Powered Video Generation
description: AI-powered video generation for educational/explanatory videos. Takes a text prompt, uses an LLM for storyboard generation, splits into 6-second chunks, generates each with Minimax video-01, and stitches with FFmpeg.

name: Spleeterino
subtitle: Neural Music Generator
description: LSTM-based music generation tool that predicts mel spectrogram frames from training audio, then generates new music autoregressively. Can stream output or save to WAV.

name: Turntable
subtitle: 3D Voxel Reconstruction from Video
description: Takes turntable/orbit videos and reconstructs 3D voxel models through reconstruction, subdivision, and differentiable flow-based hardening. Supports multi-GPU processing, interactive viewers, and PLY export.

name: Ars Chorda
subtitle: Music Theory Tool
description: Music theory and chord-related Python tool.

name: Live2D Web
subtitle: Live2D Character Rendering
description: Live2D character rendering for the web.

name: Face Rig
subtitle: Watercolor Character Rig
description: Visual/creative tool for character rigging or watercolor-style rendering.

name: Spindle
subtitle: AI Research Agent with 3D Graph Visualization
description: An AI research agent that visualizes web traversal as a real-time 3D graph. Every page the agent visits becomes an explorable node. Supports GPT-4o, Claude Opus/Sonnet/Haiku, o3 and other frontier models with mid-conversation switching. Integrated Tavily web search with live result cards, full-page content extraction, and chat history. Free tier or pay-as-you-go token billing via Stripe.

name: BranchGPT
subtitle: Branching Conversation AI Chat
description: An AI chat interface that visualizes conversations as a branching tree graph using ReactFlow. Supports multi-provider LLMs, branch/fork any message to explore alternate responses, collapse and hide branches, multi-select nodes, and compose from context. Features Stripe pay-as-you-go billing and NextAuth login.

name: Claude Cursor
subtitle: Web Terminal Session Manager
description: A web-based terminal session manager for running and juggling multiple Claude Code sessions. Uses ttyd + tmux for persistent terminal sessions accessible from any browser.

name: Audio Out Transcription
subtitle: macOS System Audio Transcription
description: macOS system audio transcription tool with forced alignment. Captures system audio via ScreenCaptureKit, transcribes with Whisper and forced alignment (praatio). Features a PyQt6 GUI.

name: Gmail Job Filter
subtitle: Automated Gmail Filtering
description: Automated Gmail filtering for job-related emails.

name: Frank Invoice Processor
subtitle: AI Invoice Processing
description: AI-powered invoice processing app. Upload PDF invoices and GPT-4o extracts structured data with real-time reactive UI updates. Built with Nuxt 3, Vue 3, and Convex.

name: Spend Sense
subtitle: Expense Tracker
description: Personal expense tracking and financial management tool.

name: Clip Forge
subtitle: Video Clip Editor
description: Video clip editing tool.

name: ISBN Lookup
subtitle: ISBN Lookup Tool
description: A small project for looking up and working with ISBNs.

name: Get Pronunciations
subtitle: Pronunciation Audio Fetcher
description: Fetches pronunciation audio files from dictionary.com.

name: UwU Filter
subtitle: Text UwU-ification Filter
description: A text uwu-ification filter that progressively degrades text into uwu-speak with replaced letters, emoticons, and degraded grammar.

name: Kindling
subtitle: Amazon Book Research Tool
description: Amazon book research and content extraction tool. Uses Selenium, pyautogui, and pytesseract for web scraping Amazon nonfiction categories, cross-referencing book ideas, and generating book content.

name: Collab Canvas
subtitle: Collaborative Drawing App
description: A collaborative canvas/drawing application with real-time collaboration, sign-in, and shared workspace dashboard. Built with Next.js and Supabase.

name: Curio
subtitle: Visual Discovery Platform for Smoke Shop
description: Two products sharing a Supabase backend: a public Next.js website with dynamically reconfiguring masonry layout for a smoke shop, and a private React Native/Expo owner app for inventory management.

name: Concord
subtitle: Messaging App
description: A Discord and Slack inspired messaging app with an extensive cloud backend. Features AI services, intelligent search, priority checking, conflict resolution, proactive AI assistant, and push notifications.

name: Deaddit
subtitle: Blogging Platform
description: A basic blogging platform with a Markdown editor for creating posts and a viewer for reading them.

name: Presence App
subtitle: Online Status Tracker
description: An app that shows who's online and who's offline.

name: Auth Minimal
subtitle: Authentication Starter
description: A minimalist authentication app with user sign-in and protected dashboard. Built with Next.js and Supabase.

name: AI Study Companion
subtitle: Educational Chatbot with Avatar
description: An interactive educational chatbot with a customizable animated avatar companion. Users converse with an AI assistant designed for learning support while personalizing the avatar's appearance.

name: AI Math Tutor
subtitle: AI Math Tutoring App
description: An AI math tutoring application that lets users upload images and interact with an AI assistant for mathematical help.

name: Seed of Athena
subtitle: Adaptive Question Generator
description: An adaptive/optimal question generation system for student assessment. If you could only ask one question to assay all your students what would it be?

name: Swiftora
subtitle: Web App
description: Web application with Firebase and Railway backend.

name: Alexa ANFE
subtitle: Cloud Run Service
description: Cloud Run service deployed on Google Cloud.

name: Marionette
subtitle: GCP Project
description: GCP project with unknown purpose.

subtitle: 3D Voxel Editor
description: A 3D voxel editor.

name: SandPond
subtitle: 3D Atom Engine
description: A 3D atom simulation engine.

subtitle: POS/Utility App
description: Point-of-sale or utility application.

subtitle: RL Environment Engineer Assessment
description: Take-home assessment for an RL Environment Engineer role.

subtitle: Game Studio Assessment
description: Take-home assignment for Visual Concepts Game Studios.

subtitle: Drug Discovery Assessment
description: Take-home assignment in Jupyter Notebook format.

subtitle: LLM Puzzle
description: A puzzle based on Little Rocket Lab for LLMs.

subtitle: Math & Science Writing
description: Academic writing by Remy Ochei in Math and Science.

name: Force-Directed Graph Engine
subtitle: Electromagnetism-Based Graph Layout
description: A local, collision-based model of electromagnetism developed to compute force-directed graphs.

name: GPU-Accelerated CNN Study
subtitle: GPU CNN Implementation Study
description: A study in implementing GPU-accelerated convolutional neural networks.

name: Feedforward Neural Net Study
subtitle: Neural Net Study
description: A simple study of feedforward neural nets in Python.

name: Neural Levenshteiner
subtitle: Neural Levenshtein Distance
description: Neural network approach to Levenshtein distance computation.

name: Suggest HCPCS
subtitle: Medical Code Matching
description: Baseline models for matching medical descriptions to their HCPCS codes.

name: Decision Tree Study
subtitle: ML Decision Tree Study
description: Machine learning study on decision trees.

name: MNIST Flax
subtitle: MNIST with JAX/Flax
description: Simple MNIST training using Flax and JAX.

name: Multivariate Linear Regression Study
subtitle: ML Regression Study
description: Machine learning regression study.

name: Van Scheduling
subtitle: CSCE 5210 Optimization
description: Van scheduling optimization project for CSCE 5210 course.

subtitle: Rounding Implementation Study
description: Stochastic rounding implementation and study.

subtitle: Price/Stock Checker Discord Bot
description: Amazon price/stock checker Discord bot.

subtitle: Music Controller Interface
